mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARD_INPUT ci WHERE ci.RCV_YMD = CURRENT_DATE) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARD_OUTPUT co WHERE co.RSRE_YMD = CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isEqual

SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL_INPUT bi WHERE bi.RCV_YMD = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL_OUTPUT bo WHERE bo.RSRE_YMD = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isEqual
